assumptions.coverage: ceil(0.5 * n_required) to n_required required families

full_framework.description: Missingness synthesis, input-mode ceilings, hard cap, composite score.

metric_only.description: band(mean observed q); ignores provenance, context, missingness.

soft_penalty_only.description: Full G with missingness synthesis; no hard cap. ClaimLevel = band(100*G).

completeness_only_checklist.description: ClaimLevel = band(100*C_comp); ignores provenance and q.

composite_without_cap.description: Full G with missingness synthesis; no ceiling meet. Equivalent to soft_penalty_only.

evidence_present.description: A if all required families have observed evidence; E otherwise.

supplier_attestation.description: Coverage-and-q based; DSE verified=1 acceptable; no mode ceilings.

assurance_case_style.description: Stylized: completeness * avg_q; no mode ceilings; E only if all absent.

control_presence.description: Fraction of required families present mapped to level thresholds.

no_context_matrix_keep_missingness.description: Replace R=2 with R>0 (applicable-families); keep missingness synthesis

no_context_matrix.description: Ignore necessity matrix; no missingness synthesis

no_input_mode_ceiling.description: Set all non-NA ceilings to A; NA remains E

no_context_matrix_keep_missingness.description: Replace R=2 with R>0 (applicable-families); keep missingness synthesis

no_context_matrix.description: Ignore necessity matrix; no missingness synthesis

no_input_mode_ceiling.description: Set all non-NA ceilings to A; NA remains E

recommended_table_generator_comparison.note: Compare uniform vs context_correlated results for each study. Directional agreement indicates framework robustness to profile-generation assumptions.

notes: Computational studies test internal soundness and implementation fidelity under synthetic audit profiles. They do not establish external practitioner validity.
soft_penalty_only and composite_without_cap use the same formula (full G with missingness synthesis, no ceiling meet). Identical results confirm they are equivalent formulations.
